positive: A stylized, high-contrast celestial forest scene. Giant, bioluminescent flora form intricate silhouettes against a deep indigo night sky. The main subject is a cluster of abstract, stylized crescent moons and glowing nebula dust that drifts between towering, stylized trees. Use a graphic, minimalist aesthetic with sharp edges and strong color blocking. Primary colors are electric teal, deep violet, and glowing gold, contrasted against a dark background. The composition must be perfectly centered, suitable for a repeatable textile print, featuring clean lines and strong, recognizable silhouettes. Flat vector illustration style combined with watercolor textures, high detail, concept art, perfect symmetry.
